name: Primary Mouse Cultured Neuron Timecourse
description: Neurons derived from male and female E16.5 cortical embryos for RNA-sequencing. Time points include 0 days in vitro (prior to plating), and 1, 5, 10, 15, and 20 days in vitro after plating. Y axis indicates normalized counts per million (CPM).
citation: Paranjapye, et. al., Developmental transcriptomic analysis of cultured primary mouse cortical neurons reveals sex-specific expression of neuropeptides BIORXIV/2026/719935
